problem_text_cn:
3-29 两个核子之间的相互作用势能可表述为 $U(r)=-\frac{r_0}{r}U_0e^{-r/r_0}$，这便是汤川(Yukawa)势。式中 $r_0(r_0=1.5×10^{-13}m)$，$U_0(U_0=50 MeV)$ 均为常量。
(1) 给出两个核子之间相互作用力的表达式；
(2) 计算当 $r=2r_0,5r_0,10r_0$ 时的作用力与 $r=r_0$ 时的作用力之比，由此可见此种力的短程特征。
problem_text_en:
3-29 The interaction potential energy between two nucleons can be expressed as $U(r)=-\frac{r_0}{r}U_0e^{-r/r_0}$, which is the Yukawa potential. Here, $r_0(r_0=1.5×10^{-13}m)$ and $U_0(U_0=50 MeV)$ are constants.
(1) Derive the expression for the interaction force between two nucleons.
(2) Calculate the ratios of the forces when $r=2r_0,5r_0,10r_0$ to the force when $r=r_0$, and illustrate the short-range nature of this force.
problem_solution_cn:
(1) 先作下述数学演算：
$$ \frac{dU}{dr}=\frac{r_0}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}+\frac{1}{r}U_0e^{-r/r_0}=\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r}U_0e^{-r/r_0}, $$
$$ r=(x^2+y^2+z^2)^{\frac{1}{2}}, $$
$$ \frac{\partial r}{\partial x}=\frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2+y^2+z^2}}=\frac{x}{r}, $$
$$ \frac{\partial r}{\partial y}=\frac{y}{r},\quad\frac{\partial r}{\partial z}=\frac{z}{r}. $$
两个核子间相互作用力 $\mathbf{F}$ 的三个分量为
$$ F_x=-\frac{\partial U}{\partial x}=-\frac{\partial U}{\partial r}\frac{\partial r}{\partial x}=-\frac{dU}{dr}\frac{\partial r}{\partial x}=-\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}x, $$
$$ F_y=-\frac{\partial U}{\partial y}=-\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}y, $$
$$ F_z=-\frac{\partial U}{\partial z}=-\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}z, $$
即得
$$ \mathbf{F}=F_x\mathbf{i}+F_y\mathbf{j}+F_z\mathbf{k}=-\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}\mathbf{r}, $$
这是一个相互吸引力。

(2) $F$ 的大小为
$$ F=\left|\mathbf{F}\right|=\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r}U_0e^{-r/r_0}, $$
可算得
$$ r=r_0\text{ 时 },F_1=\frac{2}{r_0}U_0e^{-1},\quad r=2r_0\text{ 时 },F_2=\frac{3}{4r_0}U_0e^{-2}, $$
则
$$ F_2:F_1=\frac{3}{8}e^{-1}=0.138; $$
$$ r=5r_0\text{ 时 },F_5=\frac{6}{25r_0}U_0e^{-5}, $$
则
$$ F_5:F_1=\frac{3}{25}e^{-4}=2.20×10^{-3}; $$
$$ r=10r_0\text{ 时 },F_{10}=\frac{11}{100r_0}U_0e^{-10}, $$
则
$$ F_{10}:F_1=\frac{11}{200}e^{-9}=6.79×10^{-6}. $$
problem_solution_en:
(1) Perform the following mathematical manipulations:
$$ \frac{dU}{dr}=\frac{r_0}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}+\frac{1}{r}U_0e^{-r/r_0}=\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r}U_0e^{-r/r_0}, $$
$$ r=(x^2+y^2+z^2)^{\frac{1}{2}}, $$
$$ \frac{\partial r}{\partial x}=\frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2+y^2+z^2}}=\frac{x}{r}, $$
$$ \frac{\partial r}{\partial y}=\frac{y}{r},\quad\frac{\partial r}{\partial z}=\frac{z}{r}. $$
The three components of the interaction force $\mathbf{F}$ between two nucleons are
$$ F_x=-\frac{\partial U}{\partial x}=-\frac{\partial U}{\partial r}\frac{\partial r}{\partial x}=-\frac{dU}{dr}\frac{\partial r}{\partial x}=-\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}x, $$
$$ F_y=-\frac{\partial U}{\partial y}=-\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}y, $$
$$ F_z=-\frac{\partial U}{\partial z}=-\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}z, $$
hence
$$ \mathbf{F}=F_x\mathbf{i}+F_y\mathbf{j}+F_z\mathbf{k}=-\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r^2}U_0e^{-r/r_0}\mathbf{r}, $$
which represents a mutual attractive force.

(2) The magnitude of $F$ is
$$ F=\left|\mathbf{F}\right|=\left(-\frac{r_0}{r}+1\right)\frac{1}{r}U_0e^{-r/r_0}, $$
we can calculate
$$ r=r_0\text{ gives }F_1=\frac{2}{r_0}U_0e^{-1},\quad r=2r_0\text{ gives }F_2=\frac{3}{4r_0}U_0e^{-2}, $$
so
$$ F_2:F_1=\frac{3}{8}e^{-1}=0.138; $$
$$ r=5r_0\text{ gives }F_5=\frac{6}{25r_0}U_0e^{-5}, $$
so
$$ F_5:F_1=\frac{3}{25}e^{-4}=2.20×10^{-3}; $$
$$ r=10r_0\text{ gives }F_{10}=\frac{11}{100r_0}U_0e^{-10}, $$
so
$$ F_{10}:F_1=\frac{11}{200}e^{-9}=6.79×10^{-6}. $$
img_cn: 这是一道物理习题，题号为3-29。题目描述了汤川势及其相关计算。图中包含题目的完整陈述和详细的解答步骤。解答分为两部分：(1)推导相互作用力表达式，(2)计算不同距离下的力比值。页面布局为左侧题目，右侧解答，有清晰的公式和推导过程。背景为白色，文字为黑色印刷体。

The image contains the complete problem statement and a detailed solution process. The solution consists of two parts: (1) deriving the expression for the interaction force, (2) calculating the force ratios at different distances.
